skills.name: Statue of Goddess Vakarine
skills.description: Carve a statue of Vakarine, the Goddess of the Evening Star. You may warp to other areas through the Goddess Statue.
skills.effect_text:
Allows 10 warps
Statue Duration: 60 seconds
Maximum Level: 1

skills.name: Statue of Goddess Zemyna
skills.description: Carve a statue of Zemyna, the Goddess of Earth.
skills.effect_text:
Decreases SP Consumption by CaptionRatio %
Decreases SP recovery time by 20%
Goddess Statue Duration: CaptionRatio2 seconds

skills.name: Statue of Goddess Laima
skills.description: Carve a statue of Laima, the Goddess of Fate.
skills.effect_text:
Decrease Party member's Cooldown by CaptionRatio %
Increase enemy's Cooldown by 20%
Decrease enemy's Movement Speed by CaptionRatio3 %
[Statue of Goddess Laima: Kancia] Skill factor: SkillFactor % x 2 times
[Statue of Goddess Laima: Kancia] targets: CaptionRatio2
Statue Duration: CaptionTime seconds

skills.name: Carve Attack
skills.description: Attack the target using a carving knife. Plant-type monsters take additional bonus damage.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % x 5
+ CaptionRatio additional damage to Plant monsters
AoE Attack Ratio: 1

skills.name: Carve Owl
skills.description: Carve an Owl Sculpture to watch over you, attacking enemies nearby.
skills.effect_text:
Carve Owl Skill Factor: SkillFactor %
Number of Defending: CaptionRatio
Duration: CaptionTime seconds

skills.name: Carve World Tree
skills.description: Carve a divine World Tree that silences nearby enemies and reduces their evasion.
skills.effect_text:
Decreases Enemy's Evasion by CaptionRatio2 %
[Carve World Tree: Grieztas] Skill factor: SkillFactor %
[Carve World Tree: Grieztas] targets: CaptionRatio3
Satue Duration: CaptionRatio second(s)

skills.name: Statue of Goddess Ausrine
skills.effect_text:
Statue of Zemyna
- Buff remains for CaptionRatio minutes after leaving the statue's range
-Laima Statue Buff remains for CaptionRatio minutes after leaving the statue's range
Owl Sculpture
-Decreases Damage cycle by 50%
Goddess Statue Duration: 20 seconds

attributes.name: Increased Maximum Weight
attributes.description: * Increases the character's maximum inventory weight by 20 per attribute level

attributes.name: Carve Attack: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Carve Attack] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Carve Owl: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Carve Owl] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Dievdirbys: Plant-type Damage
attributes.description: * Increases Damage against Plant-type monsters by 10% per attribute level

attributes.name: Carve Attack: Process Wood
attributes.description:
* 10% chance of dropping Sculpting Wood

when using [Carve Attack]

attributes.name: Carve World Tree: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases [Carve World Tree]'s evasion reducing effects by 0.5% per attribute level

* [Carve World Tree: Grieztas] skill factor increases by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Physical Stat: Dievdirbys
attributes.description:
* Dievdirbys' stat growth ratio is changed.

* INT ↔ STR, SPR ↔ DEX

attributes.name: [Arts] Carve Attack: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Carve Attack] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Carve Owl: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Carve Owl] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Carve Attack: Create Statue
attributes.description:
* Removes attack function of [Carve Attack], increases 1 level of Dievdirbys statues in range of [Carve Attack](Exclude Statue of Goddess Ausrine)

* Level does not increase more than 1

attributes.name: Statue of Goddess Laima: Kancia Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Statue of Goddess Laima: Kancia] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: [Arts] Statue of Goddess Laima: Kancia Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Goddess Laima: Kancia] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Carve World Tree: Grieztas Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Carve World Tree: Grieztas] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: Carve World Tree: Grieztas
attributes.description:
* Removes the original effect of [Carve World Tree]

* Cooldown of [Carve World Tree] decreases by 35 seconds and SP consumed by 10%

* [Carve World Tree] damages the enemy in range every second

attributes.name: Statue of Goddess Laima: Kancia
attributes.description:
* Removes original effect of [Statue of Goddess Laima]

* Cooldown of [Statue of Goddess Laima] decreases by 25 seconds

* Decreases the Movement Speed of enemies in the [Statue of Goddess Laima] effect range

* After 3 seconds of installation, damages the enemy in range and disappears after applying [Stun]

attributes.name: [Arts] Statue of Goddess Zemyna: Fatum
attributes.description: * Apply knockback, knockdown to the enemy in effect range during the [Statue of Goddess Laima] duration
